rect.style: animation: bar-fill-1 1.5s ease-out 0.3s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-2 1.5s ease-out 0.5s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-3 1.5s ease-out 0.7s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-4 1.5s ease-out 0.9s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-5 1.5s ease-out 1.1s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-6 1.5s ease-out 1.3s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
animation: bar-fill-7 1.5s ease-out 1.5s both, bar-glow 2s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
